1. Aries - 7/10 - Natural-born leaders, Aries are often impulsive and act on instinct.
2. Taurus - 8/10 - Reliable and practical, Tauruses tend to be down-to-earth and hardworking.
3. Gemini - 9/10 - Quick-witted and adaptable, Geminis are known for their intellectual curiosity and love of communication.
4. Cancer - 6/10 - Emotionally sensitive and nurturing, Cancers can be moody and overly attached.
5. Leo - 8/10 - Confident and charismatic, Leos have a strong sense of self-importance and love to be the center of attention.
6. Virgo - 9/10 - Analytical and meticulous, Virgos are detail-oriented perfectionists who strive for excellence.
7. Libra - 8/10 - Diplomatic and social, Librans value harmony and balance in all aspects of life.
8. Scorpio - 5/10 - Passionate and intense, Scorpions can be overly critical and secretive.
9. Sagittarius - 9/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, Sagittarians are natural explorers who love to learn and grow.
10. Capricorn - 7/10 - Responsible and ambitious, Capricorns are driven to succeed and often prioritize work over personal life.
11. Aquarius - 8/10 - Humanitarian and independent, Aquarians value freedom and individuality, but can be aloof or detached.
12. Pisces - 6/10 - Compassionate and imaginative, Pisces are empathetic and dreamy, but can be flaky or overly sensitive.
